name: adamoutler-joplin-server-vector-memory
description: In an era where cognitive labor is increasingly augmented by a rotating cast of AI assistants, your intellectual capital shouldn't be trapped in isolated digital silos. **Joplin Server Vector Memory MCP** transforms your personal notes into a universal **"AI Brain"**—a secure, centralized, and delightfully interoperable memory engine designed for the multi-agent future. Think of it as the ultimate VIP lounge where all your AI tools can securely access your best ideas! ✨
